name: infernodrift4
description: InfernoDrift4, evolved from the current InfernoDrift game.

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: node --check script.js && node --check smoke_games.mjs && node --check smoke_devmode.mjs && node --check smoke_mobile.mjs && node --check smoke_online_local.mjs && node --check apps/server/src/index.js && node --check apps/worker/src/index.js && node --check apps/worker/src/protocol.js && node --check tests/server.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/run-with-server.mjs smoke_devmode.mjs && node scripts/run-with-server.mjs smoke_mobile.mjs
